title: Parmedu 5-in-1 Multifunction Large 304 Stainless Steel Mixing Bowl Set, 3 Deep Nesting Salad Bowls Size 4QT, 3QT, 2.5QT & Colander & Grater, Model CK001
features: 【Everything You Need】Cooking and food preparation become easy with this comprehensive set that includes 3 stainless steel mixing bowls (4QT, 3QT, 2.5QT), a 10.2" grater, and a 9.4" colander.

【Premium Quality】Made with 100% food-grade 304 stainless steel, these bowls feature a mirror finish inside and brushed finish outside, ensuring they withstand any rust test. Durable and healthy for you and your family.
【Precision Design】Accurate quart and liter scales on the inside of each bowl ensure precise measurements. Silicon bottoms prevent slippage, while protecting the counter from scratches and heat.

【Space Saving & Dishwasher Safe】With the deep nesting design, the set stores away nicely and compactly when not in use. Cleaning up is a breeze - Dishwasher safe and also refrigerator/freezer safe for food storage.

【Great Gift for Your Foodie Friends】This set is an ideal gift for any cooking lover, with its versatility to mix, whip, prepare food, clean and drain fruits and vegetables, slice, grate, shred, all fitting into a nested design that stores away tidily. Comes in an attractive box, making it an unforgettable gift.
